title: Add reference-image regression tests
description: Render known scenes to an offscreen target and compare against approved reference images within a tolerance.
body: Steps: 1. Build a small deterministic scene with fixed camera and lighting. 2. Render it to an offscreen framebuffer at a fixed resolution. 3. Compare the output to an approved reference using a perceptual or per-pixel tolerance (GPUs differ slightly). 4. Fail on differences above tolerance and store the diff image. 5. Re-bless references only after deliberate, reviewed visual changes. Rollback point: before updating reference images. Validation: tests pass within tolerance across the supported drivers and a deliberate regression is caught; a single visual inspection is not a substitute for an automated reference check.
